terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.content:
Terms and Conditions

Effective date: 16 March 2026
Service name: Mindbanger
Website: www.mindbanger.com

These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Mindbanger website, products, services, digital content, subscriptions, community features, affiliate features, and related functionality (collectively, the "Service").

The Service is operated by:

Genomic Fashion s.r.o.
Nám. Sv. Martina 407/3A
90851 Holíč
Slovakia
Company ID (IČO): 55 662 072
VAT ID (IČ DPH): SK2122052933
Registered in the Commercial Register of the District Court Trnava, Section Sro, File No. 54755/T
Email: info@mindbanger.com
Support: support@mindbanger.com

By accessing or using Mindbanger, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.

1. Eligibility

  1. The Service may be used only by individuals who are at least 16 years old.
  2. Purchases, paid subscriptions, paid upgrades, and participation in the affiliate payout program are permitted only for individuals who are at least 18 years old and legally capable of entering into binding contracts.
  3. If you are between 16 and 17 years old, you may use only the free or otherwise permitted non-purchase parts of the Service unless a purchase is made lawfully by a parent or legal guardian where applicable.
  4. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate this section.

2. Nature of the Service

  1. Mindbanger provides digital products, digital content, mindset-setting materials, daily signals, subscription-based content, educational and informational materials, and related online services.
  2. Mindbanger may offer both:
    • one-time digital products; and
    • automatically renewing subscription services.
  3. Unless explicitly stated otherwise, Mindbanger content is provided for informational, educational, motivational, self-development, and wellbeing-support purposes only.
  4. Mindbanger does not provide medical, psychiatric, psychological, legal, financial, or other regulated professional advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
  5. You are solely responsible for how you use the Service and for your own decisions, actions, and results.

3. Accounts

  1. You may need to create an account to access some features.
  2. You must provide accurate, current, and complete information and keep it updated.
  3. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activity under your account.
  4. We may refuse registration, suspend accounts, or terminate accounts if we reasonably believe there is fraud, abuse, unlawful conduct, or a breach of these Terms.

4. Orders and Contract Formation

  1. By placing an order through the website, you submit an offer to purchase the selected product or subscription.
  2. A binding contract is formed when we confirm your order and/or when digital content is made available to you.
  3. We reserve the right to reject or cancel any order in cases including pricing errors, suspected fraud, payment failure, abuse, legal restrictions, sanctions compliance, or suspected breach of these Terms.
  4. You agree that electronic contract formation, records, and communications are valid and binding.

5. Prices, Taxes, and Payment

  1. Unless expressly stated otherwise, all listed prices are shown without VAT / sales tax.
  2. Where required by applicable law, the final amount payable, including any applicable taxes, will be shown at checkout before you complete your order.
  3. Payments are processed through third-party payment providers, including Stripe or other processors we may use from time to time.
  4. You authorize us and our payment providers to charge the selected payment method for all due amounts, including recurring subscription fees where applicable.
  5. You are responsible for any bank fees, currency conversion charges, transfer charges, or similar costs charged by your payment provider.

6. Subscriptions and Automatic Renewal

  1. Some Mindbanger services are offered on a recurring subscription basis.
  2. By purchasing a subscription, you authorize recurring charges at the selected billing interval until cancellation.
  3. Subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled before the next billing date.
  4. You may cancel your subscription at any time in your account settings on mindbanger.com.
  5. Cancellation stops future renewals. Unless required by law, cancellation does not retroactively refund already billed subscription periods.
  6. We may change subscription fees from time to time. Any material pricing change will apply prospectively and will be communicated in advance where required.

7. Digital Content, Immediate Access, and Withdrawal Rights

  1. Mindbanger products and subscriptions primarily involve digital content and digitally delivered services.
  2. If you are a consumer and digital content is made available immediately after purchase, you expressly request immediate performance and acknowledge that, once performance begins, you may lose any statutory right of withdrawal to the extent permitted by applicable law.
  3. Where applicable law grants a withdrawal right, that right is subject to statutory exceptions, including exceptions for digital content not supplied on a tangible medium once supply has begun with your prior express consent and acknowledgment.
  4. If a refund or withdrawal is legally required, we will process it in accordance with applicable law.
  5. Except where mandatory law provides otherwise, all sales of immediately accessed digital content are final.

8. Refunds and Complaints

  1. Because Mindbanger primarily supplies digital content with immediate access, refunds are generally not available once access has been granted, except where required by mandatory law or where expressly stated otherwise.
  2. Subscription cancellations stop future billing but do not automatically entitle you to a refund for the already started billing period unless required by law.
  3. Complaints, support requests, and billing inquiries may be sent to support@mindbanger.com.
  4. We may review refund requests individually as a goodwill gesture, but we are not obligated to grant refunds except where required by law.

9. Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

  1. use the Service unlawfully or in violation of applicable regulations;
  2. infringe intellectual property, privacy, publicity, or other rights of others;
  3. upload, transmit, or distribute harmful code, malware, or malicious content;
  4. reverse engineer, scrape, copy, frame, mirror, or exploit the Service except as allowed by law or expressly permitted by us;
  5. interfere with security, integrity, performance, or availability of the Service;
  6. use automated systems to access or abuse the Service without authorization;
  7. misrepresent your identity, affiliation, or authority;
  8. use the Service to harass, manipulate, deceive, spam, or exploit others.

10. Intellectual Property

  1. The Service and all content made available through it, including text, graphics, branding, audio, video, workflows, databases, software, designs, and other materials, are owned by Mindbanger, Genomic Fashion s.r.o., or its licensors and are protected by intellectual property laws.
  2. We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to access and use the Service for your personal or internal business use in accordance with these Terms.
  3. You may not reproduce, resell, redistribute, sublicense, publish, publicly display, modify, or create derivative works from the Service or content unless expressly permitted in writing.
  4. All trademarks, logos, and service marks are the property of their respective owners.

11. User Content

  1. If you upload, post, submit, or otherwise provide any content to the Service ("User Content"), you represent that you have the necessary rights to do so.
  2. You retain your rights in User Content, but you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to host, reproduce, process, display, and use such User Content as needed to operate, improve, secure, and provide the Service.
  3. We may remove User Content that violates these Terms, applicable law, or the rights of others.

12. Affiliate Features

  1. Registered users may receive access to affiliate links and related promotional tools subject to the Affiliate Terms.
  2. Affiliate participation, commissions, credits, and payouts are governed by the separate Affiliate Terms, which form part of these Terms by reference.
  3. Affiliate cash payouts are available only to eligible users aged 18 or older who provide all required tax, identity, and payout information.

13. Third-Party Services

  1. The Service may integrate with or rely on third-party services, including but not limited to payment processors, analytics providers, authentication providers, hosting providers, communication providers, and social login providers.
  2. We are not responsible for third-party services, their availability, their security, or their separate terms and policies.
  3. Your use of third-party services may be subject to separate agreements with those providers.

14. Availability and Changes

  1. We may modify, update, suspend, discontinue, or restrict any part of the Service at any time.
  2. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability, error-free operation, or permanent availability of any content, product, feature, or subscription tier.
  3. We may perform maintenance, upgrades, security changes, or business changes without liability, subject to mandatory law.

15. Health and Wellbeing Disclaimer

  1. Mindbanger content may include mindset, relaxation, self-development, coaching-style, audio, or suggestive material.
  2. Such content is not medical care, mental health treatment, emergency support, diagnosis, psychotherapy, or a substitute for professional healthcare.
  3. If you have a medical, psychiatric, neurological, or psychological condition, or if you are in crisis, you should seek qualified professional help and use the Service only where appropriate.
  4. Do not use the Service while driving, operating machinery, or in situations requiring full attention if any content may affect focus or relaxation.

16. Disclaimer of Warranties

To the maximum extent permitted by law, the Service is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis without warranties of any kind, whether express, implied, statutory, or otherwise, including implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, non-infringement, availability, accuracy, or results.

17. Limitation of Liability

  1. To the maximum extent permitted by law, Mindbanger, Genomic Fashion s.r.o., and their directors, officers, employees, contractors, affiliates, and licensors shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, exemplary, or punitive damages, loss of profits, loss of data, loss of goodwill, business interruption, or similar losses.
  2. To the maximum extent permitted by law, our aggregate liability arising out of or relating to the Service shall not exceed the total amount paid by you to us during the 12 months preceding the event giving rise to the claim.
  3. Nothing in these Terms excludes or limits liability that cannot be excluded under mandatory law, including certain consumer rights.

18. Indemnity

You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless Mindbanger, Genomic Fashion s.r.o., and their affiliates, officers, directors, employees, and contractors from and against claims, damages, losses, liabilities, costs, and expenses arising out of your misuse of the Service, your breach of these Terms, your User Content, or your violation of law or third-party rights.

19. Termination

  1. You may stop using the Service at any time.
  2. We may suspend or terminate access immediately if we reasonably believe you breached these Terms, acted fraudulently, caused risk, or if required for legal, security, sanctions, AML/KYC, or operational reasons.
  3. Upon termination, rights granted to you under these Terms cease, but provisions that by nature should survive termination will survive.

20. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution

  1. These Terms are governed by the laws of the Slovak Republic, excluding conflict-of-laws rules.
  2. If you are a consumer, you also retain the protection of mandatory consumer laws of your country of habitual residence to the extent applicable.
  3. For non-consumer disputes, the courts of the Slovak Republic shall have jurisdiction unless mandatory law requires otherwise.
  4. Consumers in the EU may also have access to alternative dispute resolution or other statutory remedies available under applicable law.

21. Changes to These Terms

  1. We may update these Terms from time to time.
  2. The latest version will be published on the website with the effective date.
  3. Continued use of the Service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms, except where additional consent is required by law.

22. Contact

For legal, business, and general inquiries: info@mindbanger.com
For customer support: support@mindbanger.com

privacy.title: Privacy Policy (GDPR)
privacy.content:
Privacy Policy

Effective date: 16 March 2026
Service name: Mindbanger
Website: www.mindbanger.com

This Privacy Policy explains how Genomic Fashion s.r.o. ("Mindbanger", "we", "us", "our") processes personal data in connection with the Mindbanger website, products, subscriptions, communications, affiliate features, and related services.

1. Controller

Genomic Fashion s.r.o.
Nám. Sv. Martina 407/3A
90851 Holíč
Slovakia
Company ID (IČO): 55 662 072
VAT ID (IČ DPH): SK2122052933
Registered in the Commercial Register of the District Court Trnava, Section Sro, File No. 54755/T
General email: info@mindbanger.com
Support: support@mindbanger.com
Privacy/GDPR contact: gdpr@mindbanger.com

Responsible person for privacy matters: Mgr. Miroslav Jobus

2. Who this Policy applies to

This Policy applies to visitors, customers, account holders, newsletter subscribers, affiliate users, business customers, and other individuals whose personal data we process through Mindbanger.

3. Categories of personal data we may process

Depending on how you use the Service, we may process:

  1. Identification data – first name, last name, username, display name.
  2. Contact data – email address, phone number, communication preferences.
  3. Account data – login credentials, account settings, authentication data, connected social login identifiers.
  4. Transaction and billing data – purchased products, subscription status, invoices, billing history, payment metadata, VAT/tax-related data, and limited payment-related information provided by our payment processors.
  5. Affiliate data – affiliate link usage, referral data, commission records, payout requests, wallet balances, payout details, bank details, tax details, invoicing details, and verification information where needed for payout.
  6. Technical and usage data – IP address, device data, browser type, operating system, identifiers, cookies, log records, event data, usage analytics, site navigation, campaign attribution data, and security-related metadata.
  7. Marketing data – newsletter subscriptions, open/click information, consent records, campaign preferences, and remarketing/audience data.
  8. Support and communication data – messages sent to support, email correspondence, complaint details, and related records.
  9. User-provided profile or optional data – profile fields or linked account details you choose to provide.

We do not intentionally require special categories of personal data for normal use of the Service. Please do not submit sensitive health, biometric, political, religious, or similarly sensitive personal data unless specifically requested and legally justified.

4. Sources of personal data

We collect personal data:

  1. directly from you when you register, purchase, contact us, subscribe, or use the Service;
  2. automatically through your device and our website technologies;
  3. from payment providers and fraud-prevention providers;
  4. from authentication providers, including Facebook Login and Google Login, if you choose to use them;
  5. from advertising, analytics, and attribution partners;
  6. from affiliate tracking and referral activity connected with our Service.

5. Purposes and legal bases of processing

We process personal data for the following purposes and legal bases:

A. Account creation and service delivery

To register accounts, authenticate users, deliver digital content, manage subscriptions, provide access to features, and operate the Service.
Legal basis: performance of a contract; pre-contractual measures.

B. Payments, billing, and records

To process payments, issue invoices, handle billing, maintain financial records, and administer taxes.
Legal basis: performance of a contract; compliance with legal obligations.

C. Customer support and complaints

To respond to inquiries, resolve complaints, and provide user assistance.
Legal basis: performance of a contract; legitimate interests in support and service quality.

D. Security, fraud prevention, and enforcement

To protect the Service, detect abuse, investigate fraud, verify identity where necessary, enforce rights, and comply with sanctions, AML/KYC, or legal restrictions when relevant.
Legal basis: legitimate interests; compliance with legal obligations where applicable.

E. Affiliate program administration

To track referrals, calculate commissions, manage wallet balances, review eligibility, process payout requests, collect tax and payment details, and prevent affiliate fraud.
Legal basis: performance of a contract; legitimate interests; compliance with legal obligations where applicable.

F. Newsletter and direct marketing

To send newsletters, product news, updates, offers, and promotional communications.
Legal basis: consent where required; legitimate interests where permitted by law.

G. Analytics, product improvement, and personalization

To understand usage, measure traffic, improve the Service, optimize performance, personalize content or offers, and support future marketing tools and remarketing activities.
Legal basis: consent where required for cookies/trackers; legitimate interests where lawful.

H. Legal compliance and claims

To comply with legal obligations, tax obligations, accounting requirements, court orders, or legal claims and defenses.
Legal basis: compliance with legal obligations; legitimate interests in establishing, exercising, or defending legal claims.

6. Cookies and similar technologies

We use cookies, pixels, SDKs, tags, and similar technologies for functionality, authentication, analytics, security, attribution, and marketing.

These may include tools and services related to:

  • Google Analytics
  • Meta Pixel
  • PostHog
  • Cloudflare
  • Vercel
  • authentication/session tools
  • advertising and attribution tools used now or in the future

Where required by law, we will request your consent before placing non-essential cookies or similar technologies on your device. You can also manage cookies through your browser settings and any cookie preferences tools we make available.

7. Recipients and processors

We may share personal data with trusted service providers and processors that help us operate Mindbanger, including categories such as:

  • payment processing providers (e.g. Stripe);
  • database, authentication, and backend providers (e.g. Supabase);
  • email and communication providers (e.g. Brevo);
  • hosting, CDN, security, and infrastructure providers (e.g. Vercel and Cloudflare);
  • analytics and product intelligence providers (e.g. Google Analytics and PostHog);
  • marketing and advertising providers (e.g. Meta and Google-related tools);
  • social login or identity providers (e.g. Google Login and Facebook Login);
  • accountants, legal advisers, auditors, regulators, banks, and public authorities where required.

We may also share personal data:

  1. within corporate transactions such as merger, sale, investment, or restructuring;
  2. to protect rights, users, or the public;
  3. where required by law, court order, regulatory requirement, sanctions screening, or lawful request.

8. International data transfers

Because Mindbanger may use global service providers, personal data may be transferred to countries outside the European Economic Area. Where required, we use appropriate safeguards such as adequacy decisions, standard contractual clauses, or other lawful transfer mechanisms.

9. Data retention

We retain personal data only for as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected, including:

  • for the duration of your account and service relationship;
  • for the duration of subscription and billing administration;
  • for legally required accounting, tax, and recordkeeping periods;
  • for the duration necessary to resolve complaints, disputes, claims, audits, fraud reviews, or legal obligations;
  • for marketing until you withdraw consent or object where applicable;
  • for affiliate records as needed for program administration, payout verification, tax compliance, fraud prevention, and audit trail purposes.

When retention is no longer necessary, we delete, anonymize, or securely restrict the data, unless continued retention is required by law.

10. Your rights

Subject to applicable law, you may have the right to:

  1. obtain confirmation whether we process your personal data;
  2. access your personal data;
  3. request rectification of inaccurate or incomplete data;
  4. request erasure of data in certain circumstances;
  5. request restriction of processing in certain circumstances;
  6. object to processing based on legitimate interests, including direct marketing;
  7. withdraw consent at any time where processing is based on consent;
  8. receive your data in a portable format where applicable;
  9. lodge a complaint with a competent supervisory authority.

To exercise your rights, contact gdpr@mindbanger.com.

11. Marketing communications

You may unsubscribe from marketing emails at any time by using the unsubscribe link in the email or by contacting us. Transactional and service-related communications may still be sent where necessary for account, billing, or contractual reasons.

12. Children and age limits

Mindbanger is intended for users aged 16 or older. Purchases, paid subscriptions, and affiliate cash payouts are limited to users aged 18 or older. We do not knowingly allow under-16 users to create accounts or use the Service where prohibited. If we learn that personal data was collected in violation of these rules, we may delete or restrict the relevant account and data.

13. Security

We implement reasonable technical, organizational, and contractual measures designed to protect personal data against unauthorized access, accidental loss, misuse, or unlawful alteration. No system is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

14. Changes to this Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The current version will be published on the website with the effective date.

15. Contact

General inquiries: info@mindbanger.com
Support: support@mindbanger.com
Privacy/GDPR: gdpr@mindbanger.com

affiliate.title: Affiliate Terms
affiliate.content:
Affiliate Terms and Conditions

Effective date: 16 March 2026
Service name: Mindbanger
Website: www.mindbanger.com

These Affiliate Terms and Conditions ("Affiliate Terms") govern participation in the Mindbanger affiliate program.

1. Operator

The affiliate program is operated by:

Genomic Fashion s.r.o.
Nám. Sv. Martina 407/3A
90851 Holíč
Slovakia
Company ID (IČO): 55 662 072
VAT ID (IČ DPH): SK2122052933
Email: info@mindbanger.com
Support: support@mindbanger.com

2. Eligibility

  1. Every registered Mindbanger user may receive access to affiliate functionality.
  2. Only individuals aged 18 or older may receive cash payouts or otherwise participate in monetized affiliate payouts.
  3. We may require identity verification, tax information, payout information, and other compliance data before approving or executing payouts.
  4. We may deny, suspend, restrict, or terminate affiliate participation in cases of suspected fraud, legal risk, sanctions risk, AML/KYC concerns, payment risk, abuse, policy breaches, or reputational risk.

3. Affiliate Models

Mindbanger may make available two affiliate link models:

Model 1 – Second-Month Reward Model

For eligible referred users who purchase a monthly subscription through the relevant affiliate link:

  • the affiliate may receive a one-time commission equal to 100% of the referred user’s second monthly subscription payment; and
  • the affiliate may receive 20% lifetime commission on eligible one-time products purchased by that referred user.

Model 2 – Lifetime Recurring Subscription Model

For eligible referred users who purchase a monthly subscription through the relevant affiliate link:

  • the affiliate may receive 20% recurring lifetime commission from each paid monthly subscription payment, starting from the first paid subscription payment of the referred user; and
  • the affiliate may receive 20% commission on eligible one-time products purchased by that referred user.

4. Attribution and Cookie Window

  1. The standard attribution cookie window is 30 days, unless Mindbanger changes this in the future.
  2. Commission attribution depends on successful tracking, valid referral qualification, payment completion, anti-fraud validation, and the model associated with the affiliate link used.
  3. If tracking fails because of browser restrictions, ad blockers, deleted cookies, device changes, privacy settings, technical errors outside our control, or similar causes, we do not guarantee attribution.
  4. We reserve the right to determine final attribution in good faith based on our records.

5. Qualified Referrals

A referral qualifies only if all of the following conditions are met:

  1. the referred user is a genuine new or otherwise eligible customer according to Mindbanger’s records;
  2. the referral is not fraudulent, duplicated, self-referred, artificially generated, or in breach of these Affiliate Terms;
  3. the referred purchase is completed, successfully paid, and not refunded, charged back, reversed, disputed, or cancelled;
  4. the referral complies with all applicable laws, advertising rules, anti-spam rules, and platform rules.

6. Self-Use Credit Application

  1. If an affiliate has an active personal subscription and the affiliate wallet balance is equal to or greater than the applicable subscription amount, Mindbanger may automatically apply eligible affiliate credit as a discount or internal credit toward the affiliate’s own subscription.
  2. Mindbanger may also allow affiliate credit to be used toward eligible one-time products.
  3. Internal wallet or discount use may be allowed without requiring tax payout information, because no external monetary payout is being made.
  4. Wallet credit has no cash value unless and until Mindbanger approves a cash payout request in accordance with these Affiliate Terms.

7. Payouts

  1. The minimum cash payout amount is EUR 50.
  2. Cash payouts are processed only upon request, and no more than once per week per affiliate unless Mindbanger decides otherwise.
  3. Cash payouts are made by bank transfer or another payout method approved by Mindbanger.
  4. Before any cash payout, the affiliate must provide complete and accurate tax, identification, payout, and compliance information requested by Mindbanger.
  5. Mindbanger may withhold, delay, reverse, offset, or deny payouts in cases including suspected fraud, refund risk, chargebacks, sanctions risk, AML/KYC review, incomplete information, legal restrictions, accounting discrepancies, or violation of these Affiliate Terms.
  6. Affiliates are solely responsible for declaring and paying any taxes, duties, or reporting obligations arising from affiliate income in their jurisdiction.

8. Global Participation and Country Restrictions

  1. Mindbanger intends to allow global affiliate participation.
  2. However, Mindbanger may exclude, restrict, or suspend specific countries, territories, persons, traffic sources, industries, or payout methods where required or deemed necessary for legal, sanctions, AML/KYC, payment, tax, banking, compliance, or risk-management reasons.
  3. Availability of the program or payout in a country is not guaranteed.

9. Prohibited Conduct

Affiliates must not:

  1. refer themselves, create fake accounts, create duplicate accounts, or arrange artificial transactions to generate commissions;
  2. use bots, scripts, cookie stuffing, forced clicks, hidden redirects, or other deceptive attribution techniques;
  3. engage in spam, unlawful unsolicited email, unlawful messaging, or other unlawful direct marketing;
  4. make false, misleading, deceptive, exaggerated, medical, therapeutic, guaranteed-income, or otherwise non-compliant claims about Mindbanger, its products, or affiliate earnings;
  5. impersonate Mindbanger, pretend to be an official representative, or create confusion as to sponsorship, endorsement, or affiliation;
  6. register domains, social handles, ad creatives, pages, or accounts that imitate or infringe the Mindbanger brand or mislead users into believing they are official;
  7. bid on Mindbanger branded keywords, domains, or close variants in PPC advertising without prior written consent from Mindbanger;
  8. use unauthorized coupons, fake discounts, fake scarcity, false urgency, or false claims regarding product pricing or promotions;
  9. promote Mindbanger through websites, pages, content, or traffic sources involving unlawful, hateful, violent, fraudulent, infringing, pornographic, malicious, or otherwise harmful content;
  10. violate any applicable law, platform rule, data protection rule, or advertising rule.

10. Permitted Promotion Subject to Rules

  1. Affiliates may use content marketing, social media, PPC, email marketing, landing pages, reviews, educational content, and other lawful methods.
  2. Any email marketing must be lawful in the relevant jurisdiction and sent only where the affiliate has any required consent or other valid legal basis.
  3. PPC promotion is permitted only if it does not violate the prohibited conduct section, especially brand bidding, impersonation, or misleading use of Mindbanger branding.
  4. Affiliates are responsible for ensuring their content and disclosures comply with advertising, consumer, and privacy laws in all applicable jurisdictions.

11. Disclosures

Affiliates must clearly and lawfully disclose affiliate relationships where required by law or platform rules.

12. Commission Adjustments and Reversals

Mindbanger may reverse, cancel, or adjust commissions where a transaction is refunded, charged back, cancelled, found invalid, attributed in error, associated with abuse, or otherwise fails to remain a qualified referral.

13. No Employment or Agency

Participation in the affiliate program does not create any employment, partnership, franchise, agency, joint venture, fiduciary, or representative relationship between the affiliate and Mindbanger.

14. Intellectual Property and Brand Use

  1. Mindbanger may make certain branding assets available to affiliates.
  2. Affiliates receive only a limited, revocable, non-exclusive, non-transferable permission to use approved materials solely for lawful promotion of Mindbanger under these Affiliate Terms.
  3. Mindbanger may revoke, modify, or restrict brand usage at any time.

15. Monitoring and Enforcement

Mindbanger may monitor affiliate traffic, conversion behavior, promotional practices, compliance indicators, and public-facing promotions. We may request explanations, documents, or corrective action at any time.

16. Suspension and Termination

Mindbanger may suspend or terminate any affiliate account or payout access immediately, with or without notice, where we reasonably believe there is a breach of these Affiliate Terms, fraud, compliance risk, sanctions risk, payment risk, reputational risk, or any other material risk to Mindbanger.

17. Program Changes

Mindbanger may amend, suspend, replace, or discontinue the affiliate program, any commission structure, any payout rule, any tracking method, or any eligibility condition at any time. Unless mandatory law requires otherwise, changes apply prospectively from the effective date communicated by Mindbanger.

18. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Mindbanger shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, consequential, special, or punitive losses related to the affiliate program, tracking issues, lost commissions, payout delays, technical issues, or program changes.

19. Governing Law

These Affiliate Terms are governed by the laws of the Slovak Republic, excluding conflict-of-laws rules. For non-consumer disputes, the courts of the Slovak Republic shall have jurisdiction unless mandatory law requires otherwise.

20. Contact

General questions: info@mindbanger.com
Support: support@mindbanger.com
